{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317154529816526F084079DA462"}"},"total":1203},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7420372260611539774","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常精彩的一本西游小说，里面的各个角色各有特点。
让我最佩服的是写真假美猴王和鲲鹏自己脑补[捂脸]写的真假美猴王也写得别具一格，出乎意料！
鲲鹏出场虽少但是和以往看的小说中的鲲鹏完全不一样，这个鲲鹏让我喜欢，够霸气！
另外有时候开车车门焊死了[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727696198,"group_id":"7263846596377316387","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别关注，啥都看。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0nmz4GUIqD9pi53Q3jx4Y=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4f99ec346e464ded9b63bf1bd3e9d97f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795076&x-signature=R2FZvMPYs4ae%2FnWMQobZRbwm7YY%3D","user_id":"71121254536","user_name":"一个名字啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"71121254536","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7263846596377316387","book_info":{"abstract":"［无系统，无金手指，设定按照原著，前期发育报仇，然后与七大圣结义，量劫下共谋出路，非无脑爽文］
看腻了西游套路文，来点不一样的西游故事。
西游量劫将起，四方风云涌动，
这一世，有十大圣于数十万天兵围剿下义结金兰。
有四州大妖伐满天神佛而战。
亦有仙人风流，豪杰义气。
西游路上，
孙悟空：九弟，就让我保师父过去吧！
姬承：先打赢本王一群小弟再说。
（PS，注意，非无脑爽文，重要的事情说三遍）
（PS:第一章最后，有惊喜哦。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/859f09917759f7832256a9e7bbd2d879","author":"花小府","author_id":"","book_id":"7263846596377316387","book_name":"重生西游之玄霄妖帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9602人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276275557803754020","read_count":"9602","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1063019"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"475","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5d9e773480186a925432ea9e60770162~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441345&x-signature=2FZNKJy4S3mFnsV09DT7s3RraPE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97597337133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"345"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317154529816526F084079DA462"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durati
